label: Featured Research
title: Quantum Decoherence in Open Systems
body: An investigation into how quantum systems lose coherence through environmental entanglement — modelling the decoherence timescale for spin-boson systems using density matrix formalism and Lindblad master equations.

label: Computational Physics
title: N-Body Gravitational Simulation
body: Symplectic integrator implementation for long-timescale planetary dynamics. Conserves energy to machine precision using Yoshida 4th-order coefficients.

label: Statistical Mechanics
title: Phase Transitions in 2D Ising Model
body: Monte Carlo simulation of ferromagnetic phase transitions. Observed critical exponents near Tc and verified against Onsager's exact solution.

label: Science Communication
title: Visual Explainer: Entropy & Information
body: A visual essay connecting thermodynamic entropy with Shannon information theory — designed for educated non-physicists.
